The '''Scanner Jammer''' was a mobile platform produced by [[Loratus Manufacturing]] and used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the early stages of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

The Scanner Jammer was designed with a variety of countermeasures to disrupt and jam enemy scanners and sensors. It also served as an effective intelligence-gathering device, with a secondary ability to scan any part of the battlefield for a few moments.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]''
